news.t: 3 Inverse Small-Cap ETFs Ready to Bear Gains

holdings.infoBox: SRTY is an equity ETF with a total of 14 individual holdings. The top holdings are ProShares GENIUS Money Market ETF stock at N/A, TREASURY BILL at N/A, TREASURY BILL at N/A, TREASURY BILL at N/A, and TREASURY BILL at N/A.

overview.description: The ProShares UltraPro Short Russell2000 (SRTY) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Russell 2000 index. The fund provides 3x inverse exposure to a market-cap-weighted index of US small-cap companies. SRTY was launched on Feb 11, 2010 and is issued by ProShares.

data.title: 3 Inverse Small-Cap ETFs Ready to Bear Gains
data.text: Small-cap stocks have underperformed the S&P 500 since March. Short a recent Russell 2000 rally using these three inverse ETFs.
